title: Align sink wash hold target with visible sink UI
goal: Make sink wash interaction use the same visible region that the player sees, and enlarge the sink wash CTA on desktop/mobile without changing other sink behaviors.
constraints: Keep current selection-state sink actions (wok-content -> move-wok-to-sink, placed-container -> dispose)
Do not fix by globally raising --equip-btn-min-size for all equipment
Reuse the recent burner input-ownership principle
Preserve CSS 3D chain and transform order
acceptance: Dirty or burned wok at sink starts wash hold from the full intended visible sink wash region
Visible sink wash CTA size matches the actual holdable area on desktop and mobile
Wok-content selection still moves wok to sink
Placed-container selection still disposes at sink
Empty sink or clean sink does not trigger unintended wash behavior
